export class TradeOpenParser{constructor(){this._sessionId=0;this._userAId=0;this._userBId=0;this._usernameA='';this._usernameB='';}flush(){this._sessionId=0;this._userAId=0;this._userBId=0;this._usernameA='';this._usernameB='';return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Must match TradeOpenComposer.java EXACTLY
this._sessionId=wrapper.readInt();this._userAId=wrapper.readInt();this._userBId=wrapper.readInt();this._usernameA=wrapper.readString();this._usernameB=wrapper.readString();return true;}get sessionId(){return this._sessionId;}get userAId(){return this._userAId;}get userBId(){return this._userBId;}get usernameA(){return this._usernameA;}get usernameB(){return this._usernameB;}}
